nasb.text: Isaac went out to meditate in the field toward evening; and he lifted up his eyes and looked, and behold, camels were coming.

esv.text: And Isaac went out to meditate in the field toward evening. And he lifted up his eyes and saw, and behold, there were camels coming.

cnv.text: 黃昏的時候，以撒出來田間默想。他舉目觀看，忽然看見來了些駱駝。

ccb.text: 傍晚的时候，以撒来到田间默想，他抬头一看，见一队骆驼迎面而来。

csbs.text: 以撒傍晚出去，在田野沉思；他举目观看，看哪，来了一支骆驼队！
